title: ChatGPT Desktop App Launches Voice Mode: Dictate Your Requests, AI Handles Multiple Tasks Simultaneously - Meeting Minutes Ready While You Brew Coffee
excerpt: OpenAI announced an update to the ChatGPT desktop application (now integrated with Codex), introducing a ChatGPT Voice mode powered by the GPT-Live model. Users
content_html:
OpenAI announced an update to the ChatGPT desktop application (now integrated with Codex), introducing a ChatGPT Voice mode powered by the GPT-Live model. Users can initiate, check, or adjust tasks through voice in three areas: chatting, working, and programming, enabling multi-threaded work collaboration.

Full-duplex voice support, talk and work at the same time

In terms of development, OpenAI first introduced voice recognition features for ChatGPT in 2024, and has since continued to invest in voice technology. The newly released GPT-Live model achieves full-duplex voice, allowing simultaneous listening and speaking, making AI conversations feel more like real human interactions. OpenAI stated in their announcement: "We are moving towards our AI vision, and in the future, users will only need to speak their requirements, and ChatGPT will quickly advance multiple tasks based on your thoughts."

ChatGPT Voice allows users to start multiple workflows from a single conversation and continue talking while intelligent agents complete tasks in the background. For example, when planning a business trip, users can ask ChatGPT to check the calendar for conflicts, sort through the inbox to see if there are any changes to flights, and prepare meeting notes—all of which are completed while "the user is making coffee or doing other things." This means AI is no longer just a tool that answers one question at a time, but rather something that can truly take over your multi-task workflow, moving voice interaction from simple conversation to efficient agent collaboration.

sentences.en: For example, when planning a business trip, users can ask ChatGPT to check the calendar for conflicts, sort through the inbox to see if there are any changes to flights, and prepare meeting notes—all of which are completed while "the user is making coffee or doing other things."
sentences.zh: 例如，在计划出差时，用户可以要求ChatGPT检查日历是否有冲突，整理收件箱以查看航班是否有变化，以及准备会议记录——所有这些都是在“用户正在煮咖啡或做其他事情”时完成的。

sentences.en: This means AI is no longer just a tool that answers one question at a time, but rather something that can truly take over your multi-task workflow, moving voice interaction from simple conversation to efficient agent collaboration.
sentences.zh: 这意味着人工智能不再只是一种一次回答一个问题的工具，而是可以真正接管您的多任务工作流程，将语音交互从简单的对话转变为高效的座席协作。

content_html_zh:
OpenAI 宣布更新 ChatGPT 桌面应用程序（现已与 Codex 集成），引入由 GPT-Live 模型支持的 ChatGPT 语音模式。 用户可以在聊天、工作、编程三个方面通过语音发起、查看或调整任务，实现多线程工作协作。

全双工语音支持，边通话边工作

在发展方面，OpenAI于2024年首次为ChatGPT引入了语音识别功能，此后持续投入语音技术。 新发布的GPT-Live模型实现了全双工语音，允许同时听和说，让AI对话感觉更像真人交互。 OpenAI在公告中表示：“我们正在朝着我们的AI愿景迈进，未来，用户只需要说出自己的需求，ChatGPT就会根据你的想法快速推进多项任务。”

ChatGPT Voice 允许用户从单个对话启动多个工作流程，并在智能代理在后台完成任务时继续通话。 例如，在计划出差时，用户可以要求ChatGPT检查日历是否有冲突，整理收件箱以查看航班是否有变化，以及准备会议记录——所有这些都是在“用户正在煮咖啡或做其他事情”时完成的。 这意味着人工智能不再只是一种一次回答一个问题的工具，而是可以真正接管您的多任务工作流程，将语音交互从简单的对话转变为高效的座席协作。
